canonical_question: What are Oracle ERP Cloud (Fusion) REST API capabilities - 499-record pagination, expand vs fields?
aliases: Oracle Fusion Cloud REST API limits and pagination
Oracle ERP Cloud API capabilities and rate limits
How to paginate Oracle Fusion REST API beyond 499 records
Oracle Cloud Applications REST API expand vs fields parameter

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: REST Framework v3 (2022) — expand returns collection resources with pagination

constraints: Maximum 500 records per REST request (practical limit 499 due to < 500 behavior)
Default page size is 25 records if limit parameter not specified
Maximum 1 MB payload size per REST request
Bulk API limited to 50 operations per batch call
Rate limits are tiered by identity domain type: Free (150/min), Oracle Apps (1,500/min), Premium (5,000/min)
REST API not recommended for bulk data operations exceeding 500 records — use FBDI instead
Server may override client-specified limit parameter to protect application performance

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs bulk data import/export of >500 records at a time
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Use FBDI (File-Based Data Import) or BI Publisher reports for bulk operations

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs SOAP API capabilities for Oracle ERP Cloud
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Oracle ERP Cloud SOAP API documentation

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) adapter capabilities
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Oracle Integration Cloud ERP adapter documentation

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
